final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand style guide asset for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn-themed Oriental fragrance brand, showing primary color, secondary colors, and typography specimens.

Style/medium: clean flat editorial design, brand identity system sheet in the spirit of a high-end Japanese/Chinese luxury brand manual, minimal white space, refined restraint
Composition: portrait layout divided into clear horizontal zones — color swatches row at top, typography specimen block in center, accent detail strip at bottom; generous padding throughout
Subject: brand style guide for 染秋 (RAN QIU) featuring primary color swatch, secondary color swatches, and Chinese/Latin typeface pairings; each swatch labeled with hex code and color name; each typeface shown at multiple weights with sample glyphs
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white or warm ivory background evoking handmade washi paper texture, no photographic scene
Lighting/mood: flat, even, print-ready — no shadows or gradients on background; mood is warm, poetic, autumnal
Color palette: primary color is deep osmanthus amber (rich warm orange-brown, approx #B5541C or similar); secondary palette includes persimmon red (#C0392B range), maple crimson, oolong tea brown, sandalwood beige, and muted sage; black ink for type; ivory/washi white as base — warm tones dominate, cool tones used only as neutrals
Materials/textures: subtle washi paper grain on background only; color swatches are flat matte rectangles with no gloss
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: all Chinese characters must render correctly and legibly; color swatch labels must include hex codes; typography zone must show at least two weights (regular + bold or light + regular); layout must be print-safe with no bleed artifacts; scalable to A4 portrait
Avoid: gradients on swatches, neon or cool-toned colors, Western sans-serif only (must include a Chinese-compatible typeface), cluttered layout, drop shadows, generic Behance brand board aesthetic, lorem ipsum placeholder text
